div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
div.span:
1. Is a single Rails app
sufficient?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Stop here.
Use namespaces and
good code organisation.

span.p:
Build separate services
with appropriate tech stack.
